subcodes.first_line: O dear companion of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Thy gracious letter was received which, praised be God, betokeneth the spirit and fragrance of thy heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رفیق عزیز عبدالبهاء نامه لطیف شما رسید الحمد لله دلیل بر روح و ریحان آن قلب
subcodes.subjects: @importance of community building, @contention and conflict, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
